summary: Added a generated-art Chapter Archive to Path Map so long lane histories become date-derived mission-journal chapters with clickable focus, Event Proof sync, and Event Stream reveal behavior.

queries: timeline grouped by date design pattern activity feed chapters
quest log UI design pattern milestones blockers history
game codex journal UI chapter archive design
Carbon Design System structured list progressive disclosure timeline
Clarity Design system timeline wizard multi step workflow
pattern_notes: Large histories need navigable structure, not only chronological scroll.
Progressive disclosure keeps the first view compact while letting deeper evidence open on demand.
Structured selectable rows and step/timeline patterns support direct movement between grouped stages.

generated_asset.prompt: Premium sci-fi archive console for a path-history chapter index, wide game UI background, layered glass archive plates, route markers, central circular scanner, dark edges for UI overlay, teal/amber/green accents, no text, no logos, no watermark.

data_inputs: existing Visual Asset Vault system records
ui_contract: Group the selected lane trail into date-derived Chapter Archive cards without changing snapshot schema.
Show generated mission-journal artwork behind the archive panel and register it in the Visual Asset Vault.
Display chapter counts for proofs, gates, unlocks, and total chapter count.
Clicking a chapter focuses that chapter's newest event in Event Proof, synchronizes Route Replay when possible, and reveals enough Event Stream rows to include the chapter.
Keep layout responsive with no horizontal overflow across mobile, tablet, and desktop widths.

red_route.evidence: Before implementation, Path Map had 0 .path-chapter-archive panels and 0 data-path-chapter-focus controls while Path Map and Event Stream were present.

green_route.evidence: Rendered one Chapter Archive using path-chapter-archive-20260618.png, two chapter cards, 06/15 active with 43 route records, and stats for 2 chapters, 22 proofs, 0 gates, and 21 unlocks.

chapter_click.evidence: Clicking the 06/14 chapter made it active, focused Event Proof on 'Create internal package manifest for Agent Skill Starter Kit v0', moved Event Proof position to 44/64, synced Route Replay to Stage 21 of 64, and expanded Event Stream to 64 of 64 visible.

asset_vault.evidence: Visual Asset Vault rendered a system card titled Path Chapter Archive with archive badge and generated archive-console metadata.

responsive.evidence: All tested viewports rendered one archive, two chapter controls, document width equal to client width, and no bad rectangles.
